name: Octane
description: Octane — Usage-based billing platform for API and SaaS products with metering, pricing, and customer credit management.

seo.title: Octane — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Octane: Octane — Usage-based billing platform for API and SaaS products with metering, pricing, and customer credit management.

when_to_use: Metering API calls for usage-based SaaS billing
Managing customer credit wallets and prepaid top-ups
Building hybrid pricing (seat + usage) for AI products
Real-time usage alerts triggering automated billing events

pros: Purpose-built for usage-based API and SaaS billing
Real-time metering with low-latency pricing engine
Customer credit and prepaid wallet management
Clear APIs and reasonable developer experience
cons: Narrow focus; lacks full CPQ or quote-to-cash
Smaller customer base than Metronome or m3ter
Requires engineering effort to model pricing correctly
review.verdict: Credible usage-billing engine for API-first products, competing in a crowded Metronome/Orb/m3ter space.
review.best_for: API and infrastructure companies needing real-time metering and prepaid credit billing.
review.not_for: Flat-rate SaaS, sales-led enterprise deals, or teams wanting full quote-to-cash in one tool.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.

developer_experience.reason: API docs and SDKs for metering
